description:
Reconstruct the 'Legacy-V1' wind turbine rotor in QBlade as a Digital Twin matching the provided specifications. Generate NACA 4424 (Root) and NACA 4412 (Tip) airfoils with an XFoil Polar Analysis at Re=1,000,000 for both. Create a blade named 'Legacy-V1' using the following station configuration:

| Position (m) | Chord (m) | Twist (deg) | Airfoil   |
|--------------|-----------|-------------|-----------|
| 0.0          | 2.50      | 20.0        | NACA 4424 |
| 5.0          | 2.30      | 15.0        | NACA 4424 |
| 15.0         | 1.80      | 8.5         | NACA 4412 |
| 30.0         | 1.00      | 2.0         | NACA 4412 |
| 40.0         | 0.60      | 0.0         | NACA 4412 |

Export the chord distribution to ~/Documents/projects/chord_dist.dat, the twist distribution to ~/Documents/projects/twist_dist.dat, and save the project to ~/Documents/projects/legacy_v1_reconstruction.wpa.
